children.heading: Coordination
children.label: a Coordination
children.text: In carrying out this part, the Secretary shall coordinate activities, and effectively manage crosscutting research priorities across programs of the Department and other relevant Federal agencies, including the National Laboratories.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In carrying out this part, the Secretary shall collaborate with industry, National Laboratories, other relevant Federal agencies, institutions of higher education, including minority-serving institutions and research reactors, Tribal entities, including Alaska Native Corporations, and international bodies with relevant scientific and technical expertise.

children.heading: Participation
children.label: 2 Participation
children.text: To the extent practicable, the Secretary shall encourage research projects that promote collaboration between entities specified in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Dissemination of results and public availability
children.label: c Dissemination of results and public availability
children.text: The Secretary shall, except to the extent protected from disclosure under , publish the results of projects supported under this part through Department websites, reports, databases, training materials, and industry conferences, including information discovered after the completion of such projects.section 552(b) of title 5

children.heading: Education and outreach
children.label: d Education and outreach
children.text: In carrying out the activities described in this part, the Secretary shall support education and outreach activities to disseminate information and promote public understanding of nuclear energy.

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: e Technical assistance
children.text: In carrying out this part, for the purposes of supporting technical, nonhardware, and information-based advances in nuclear energy development and operations, the Secretary shall also conduct technical assistance and analysis activities, including activities that support commercial application of nuclear energy in rural, Tribal, and low-income communities.

children.heading: Program review
children.label: f Program review
children.text: At least annually, all programs in this part shall be subject to an annual review by the Nuclear Energy Advisory Committee of the Department or other independent entity, as appropriate.

children.heading: Sensitive information
children.label: g Sensitive information
children.text: The Secretary shall not publish any information generated under this part that is detrimental to national security, as determined by the Secretary.
